what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links attachment att-afc49456, of type board_items, to board item item-b7c90dd1 in the dragnet-development channel and records when it was added.
observations: YAML frontmatter metadata with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
The target is expressed as a board://item-b7c90dd1 URI
The file has no body content beyond the frontmatter
The added timestamp is an ISO 8601 value with timezone offset
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Uses a board:// URI scheme to reference a board item
Follows a flat key-value schema for attachment records
notes: A metadata stub that records which board item a channel attachment points to, plus a timestamp.
questions: What does the referenced board item item-b7c90dd1 represent?
What is the semantic meaning of attachment_type board_items?
Who or what process added this attachment?
Why was this particular board item attached to the channel?
intention_signals: To create a durable, queryable record associating a channel attachment with a specific board item so the relationship can be retrieved or audited later.
novelty: Uses a board:// URI to target a board item rather than a conventional file or URL.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between a channel memory attachment and a board item, enabling cross-referencing without duplicating board content.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment metadata file linking attachment att-afc49456 in dragnet-development to board item item-b7c90dd1 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: Record the association of a board item with a channel attachment for traceability and retrieval.
